---
title: "Lecture 13 - Nested ANOVA"
author: "Bill Perry"

knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    paged.print: false
    collapse: true
format:
  html:
    downloads: [docx, pptx, typst]  # This creates download links for all three
  revealjs:
    output-ext: "slides.html"
  docx: default
  pptx: default

editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---
